source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage / Crane Shock Loading

event.top_event: Crane shock loading due to packer shear ring failure
actions_taken: Crane operator stowed crane in boom rest and reported out of service
FWE contracted Gulf Crane Services for post-incident inspection
Damaged boom cable replaced on February 11, 2020
Packer sent to Eminent Oil Services for root cause analysis
BSEE conducted on-site follow-up investigation on February 14, 2020
event.summary: On February 10, 2020, at 5:45 am, a shock loading incident occurred with the platform crane at Vermilion Block 371 while setting a tension packer during plug and abandonment operations. The packer's shear ring failed at 26,000 pounds of pull (below its 40,000 pound rating) due to the ring not being changed after previous settings per manufacturer instructions. The sudden load reduction from 26,000 to 9,000 pounds shock loaded the crane, damaging the 9/16 inch diameter Dyform 6 boom cable. Root causes included failure to follow API RP 2D guidelines, use of incorrect Job Safety Analysis, crew misunderstanding of shear ring rating (believed 50,000 pounds instead of 40,000 pounds), and non-compliance with manufacturer instructions to change shear ring after each setting.
recommendations: Draft safety alert to not use platform crane to set tension packers
Draft safety alert to follow manufacturer instruction to change shear ring on MAD-1 tension packer after each setting
Install load cell data recording device for lifts utilizing platform cranes for well work to reduce events beyond SOP guidelines and provide critical data records

hazards.name: High-pressure fluid energy in packer system
Mechanical load on crane during packer setting
Fatigue and degradation of crane components

threats.name: Shear ring failure due to non-replacement after previous settings
Excessive load applied to crane beyond design parameters
Misunderstanding of shear ring pressure rating
Use of crane for non-lifting application (packer setting)

consequences.name: Damage to boom cable (9/16 inch Dyform 6)
Potential personnel injury from sudden load release

controls.name: API RP 2D compliance for crane operations
controls.barrier_role: Procedural control to ensure safe load handling
controls.lod_basis: Industry standard for offshore crane operations

supporting_text: BSEE has determined FWE did not follow API 2D sixth edition during the setting of the packer
API RP 2D 6th Edition Appendix B.3.2.3 states 'Guidelines for moving the load are as follows: Before starting to lift, the following conditions shall be verified: 2. The load is free to be lifted'
FWE had no intentions of lifting the packer while setting the packer in the 7 5/8 inch casing

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA) for packer setting operations
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to identify hazards and safe work procedures

supporting_text: FWE plug and abandonment crew used the wrong JSA during the incident
The JSA used on February 10, 2020, is for setting a packer with casing jacks
The JSA has the wrong setting weights and wrong shear ring weight
The designated ultimate work authority (UWA) on the JSA did not approve the JSA with a signature
The JSAs for February 03, 2020, and February 09, 2020 are missing

controls.name: Manufacturer shear ring replacement procedure
controls.barrier_role: Maintenance control to ensure equipment integrity

supporting_text: The operating instructions recommend changing the shear ring after each setting
FWE did not change the shear ring after previous settings

Documents showed FWE used the packer on three separate days. February 03, 2020, the crane operator set the packer using 32,000 pounds of pull. February 09, 2020, the crane operator set the packer using 20,000 pounds of pull. February 10, 2020, the crane operator set the packer using 20,000 pounds of pull

controls.name: Shear ring pressure rating verification and communication
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to ensure correct equipment parameters are known
controls.lod_basis: Equipment specification and crew knowledge requirement

supporting_text: The FWE crew did not know the value of the shear ring, the crew reported to BSEE investigators the shear ring value to be 50,000 pounds
The investigation revealed the shear ring value of the ring is 40,000 pounds
EOS documents show the shear ring setting is 40,000 pounds and not 50,000 pounds as reported by FWE
The tolerances set in manufacturing for the shear ring is 10% + or -, this was a 40,000 pound shear ring so the accepted tolerance would be from 36,000 pounds – 44,000 pounds

controls.name: Crane boom cable inspection and maintenance
controls.barrier_role: Engineering control to detect and prevent cable failure

supporting_text: GCS started a post shock load event inspection on the crane at 11:00 am
The crane mechanic found the 9/16 inch diameter dyform 6 boom cable stretched during the shock loading event
The crane mechanics replaced the damaged boom cable on February 11, 2020
The existing 9/16 inch diameter Dyform 6 boom cable stretched during the shock loading event, confirming the damage to the boom cable

controls.name: Load cell data recording device for crane lifts
controls.barrier_role: Engineering control to monitor and record load data

supporting_text: The recommendation to 'recommend' a load cell data recording device for lifts when utilizing a crane (specifically a 'basic' model type platform crane) for well work is favorable
Simply by installing the load cell recording device, it would reduce the number of events of lifts beyond SOP guidelines and provide a critical data record for crane failure events

controls.name: Pre-tour safety meeting and hazard discussion
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to communicate hazards and procedures

supporting_text: On the night of the incident February 9, 2020, at 6:00 pm, the night supervisor held a pre-tour safety meeting discussing the job task and hazards on the deck
At 12:30 am, the night crew held a brief safety meeting and documented on a Job Safety Analysis (JSA) the steps for setting a packer

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
